name: JoAi: Delete Item

description.en: Permanently remove an item from your agent.
description.de: Entferne ein Element dauerhaft von deinem Agenten.
description.es: Permanently remove an item from your agent.
description.fr: Permanently remove an item from your agent.
description.ro: Permanently remove an item from your agent.
description.it: Permanently remove an item from your agent.

bot: Use this when the user wants to remove an item. If the user refers to an item by title, list items first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Item ID

description.en: The ID of the item to delete
description.de: Die ID des zu löschenden Elements
description.es: The ID of the item to delete
description.fr: The ID of the item to delete
description.ro: The ID of the item to delete
description.it: The ID of the item to delete

inputs.bot: The item hash ID. If the user refers to an item by title, list items first to find the matching ID.
